prompts.visible_text: No second attempt is authorized; retain the common starting artifact.
You may produce one revised artifact. No new task information or artifact inspection view is provided.
Review your work and improve any issue you can identify from the public task and your existing context.
Inspect the allowlisted native artifact and derived render, then revise if warranted. No evaluator criterion or result is supplied.
